sentiment.reasoning: A 3% margin improvement indicates operational efficiency gains that directly boost profitability.

headlines.headline: Nolvav Commerce secures $75M contract with a multinational manufacturer

sentiment.reasoning: An acquisition to strengthen infrastructure is a strategic move that may improve long-term capabilities but carries integration uncertainty.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
